---
title: Quick Start
---

* Each lab has its own onboaring and offboarding procedures. Please contact your lab's key-user for more information on how to use SciSure. 
* To get started with SciSure, please see the [Quick Start Guide](https://support.elabnext.com/hc/en-us/sections/36677043587732-Quick-Start-Guide) 
* For more information regarding all SciSure products, such as inventory, protocols, or studies, see the [Product Documentation](https://support.elabnext.com/hc/en-us/categories/36665746497940-Product-Documentation)
